title: Accounting Year totals schema
description: A schema for retrieving the total amount of an accounting year.

totalInBaseCurrency.description: The total entry amount in base currency for the accounting year.

self.description: A unique reference to the account resource.

fromDate.description: The first date in the period formatted according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

toDate.description: The last date in the period formatted according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

self.description: The unique self reference of the resource.
